title: 대치: 스탠스의 대화
color_mood: 블루-그레이, 안개가 조금 걷히며 미세한 햇빛 유입, 검날 반사광

cuts.subject: 두 전사가 다리 중앙을 향해 천천히 접근, 약 5미터 거리에서 멈춤
cuts.action: 에이든과 카게마사가 서로를 향해 한 걸음씩 신중하게 접근하다 동시에 멈춤. 에이든이 롱소드를 앞으로 들어 가드 포지션
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic medium two-shot slightly low angle, on ancient ruined stone bridge at dawn, two warriors approaching center from opposite ends and halting simultaneously 5 meters apart, left: Aiden, medieval knight in dark steel partial plate armor with chain mail, scarred face, brown hair, longsword with runic engravings raised into guard position, right: Kagemasa, samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor with gold imperial crest, wide shoulder sode, kabuto helmet with crescent maedate, wearing menpou demon face mask, nodachi sword with cherry blossom tsuba held high in jodan upper stance, morning fog partially lifting, faint oblique sunlight beginning to filter through mist, blue-grey desaturated atmosphere, both warriors locked in tense stillness, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Slow dolly forward stops as both warriors halt, camera settles into static lock-off at chest height

cuts.subject: 에이든과 카게마사가 각각 스탠스를 미세하게 조정하며 서로의 움직임을 읽는 심리전
cuts.action: 에이든이 가드를 왼쪽으로 옮기자 카게마사가 즉시 노다치 각도를 미세하게 조정. 발놀림 한 발, 무게 중심 이동. 두 사람의 눈이 상대방의 무기 위치를 쫓음
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic medium close-up cross-cut sequence, Art of Battle stance reading duel, Aiden, medieval knight in dark steel partial plate armor with chain mail, shifting sword guard left, eyes tracking opponent's blade, versus Kagemasa, samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor with gold imperial crest, wide shoulder sode, kabuto helmet with menpou demon face mask, micro-adjusting nodachi angle in response, feet shuffling on mossy stone bridge, weight shifting low, oblique morning sunlight catching both blades faintly, breath vapor visible in cold air, blue-grey desaturated, extreme psychological tension, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Cross-cut medium shots alternating between the two warriors, camera static on each, cutting rhythm slow and deliberate like a heartbeat

cuts.subject: 에이든의 손가락이 롱소드 그립을 쥐는 디테일, 검날 위 물방울
cuts.action: 갑옷 장갑 안에서 손가락이 힘을 주어 그립을 조여듦. 검날 위에 안개 물방울 하나가 맺혀 흘러내림
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic extreme close-up macro detail, gauntleted fingers gripping longsword hilt with runic engraving, dark steel armor joint at knuckle, a single water droplet from morning fog rolling slowly down the blade toward the crossguard, cold blue-grey light, metallic surface texture, ASMR-level detail, breath tension visible in moisture, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Static macro, only the water droplet moves, slow roll down the blade edge

cuts.subject: 카게마사의 발이 돌 위를 긁듯 한 걸음 내딛음, 갑옷 스트랩 당기는 소리
cuts.action: 카게마사의 옻칠 갑옷 족갑이 이끼 낀 석조 위를 미세하게 밀듯 한 걸음. 허리 가죽 스트랩이 팽팽히 당겨짐
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic extreme close-up macro detail, deep navy lacquered samurai waraji foot armor scraping one deliberate step on moss-covered ancient stone bridge, intricate lacquerwork and leather armor strap pulled taut at the waist joint, stone surface texture and green-grey moss under armored foot, oblique cold morning light catching lacquer sheen, blue-grey desaturated with subtle gold glint from lacquer, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Static macro, slow single step forward scraping stone, leather strap tension visible

cuts.subject: 에이든의 눈이 카게마사의 노다치 각도를 읽고, 카게마사의 눈이 에이든의 어깨 움직임을 추적
cuts.action: 두 전사의 눈이 상대의 무기와 몸을 미세하게 스캔. 에이든의 투구 안 눈이 가늘어짐. 카게마사의 멘포 위 눈이 상대를 꿰뚫듯 고정
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic tight close-up alternating over-the-shoulder, eyes only visible beneath battle helmets, left: Aiden's scarred face visible under open-faced bascinet helmet, brown hair, narrow intense eyes reading opponent's sword angle, right: Kagemasa's eyes above menpou demon-face half-mask, deep focused gaze tracking enemy shoulder movement, both faces framed by cold blue-grey fog behind, oblique morning light on face edges, extreme psychological intensity, no dialogue, story told through eyes alone, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Alternating tight close-ups, no camera movement, cutting between eyes in slow rhythm, breath fog visible from nostrils

cuts.subject: 두 전사가 동시에 한 발씩 앞으로 내딛으며 본격적인 대치 완성, 카메라가 천천히 뒤로 빠지며 다리 전체와 안개가 보임
cuts.action: 에이든과 카게마사가 동시에 한 걸음 전진. 간격이 약 3미터로 좁혀짐. 두 검이 햇빛을 받아 동시에 빛남. 카메라가 뒤로 빠지며 두 전사와 안개 낀 다리 전체를 포착
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic wide pull-back shot, two warriors stepping forward simultaneously on ancient ruined stone bridge, closing gap to 3 meters, left: Aiden, medieval knight in dark steel partial plate armor with chain mail, longsword with runic engravings catching oblique morning sunlight, right: Kagemasa, samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor with gold imperial crest, wide shoulder sode, kabuto helmet with menpou demon face mask, nodachi sword with cherry blossom tsuba gleaming with first sunlight, fog partially cleared revealing moss-covered bridge details and misty abyss below, camera slowly pulling back to reveal full bridge and surrounding fog landscape, tension at peak before combat erupts, blue-grey desaturated with first warm sunlight glints on blades, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Slow pull-back dolly as both warriors step forward simultaneously, revealing full bridge tableau, ends on wide locked frame with both warriors facing off in center
